reviews.review_description:
I LOVE this game! My buddy and I have been playing this game for quite a while and still have tons of content left. We alternate roles in separate saves so it sort of doubles our gameplay. It’s so challenging and fun. The art style is fantastic. It runs great and we haven’t run into any significant bugs yet. The weirdly dark theme (reaping lost souls) works so well with the visuals. 
This is one of our favorite co-op games.

Hi devs, i love this Game and my Friend too! But the Problem is, that she can‘t Play vr Games. We tried it it several times, she is always getting sick after 15-20 minutes 😞 is there any chance you could destroy the vr world/background and make/program a Mixed Reality…? Please, i love playing Carly alone, but together it‘s so much easier and more fun!!!
I was fascinated by this project. Thank you to the authors for this exceptional work. I really enjoy it.
One of my all time favorites! Interesting environment, way cool manipulations and challenging but not overwhelming. The addition of multiplayer puts it right over. Wish there was more!!!!
Would be cool if carlys pov wasn't in the sky and instead be 1st person

Super to play with family or friends. Lasted many hours (we played it over 4 months) but super fun. Lots of positive frustration while you finally figure out the tricks! Loved it. Sad we made it to the end as we are done. One of us is doing it over but solo

As of right now this is quit literally the only co-op puzzle game. There is nothing like this game and I only wish there was more!! This was so much fun to play through with a friend. It is a unique vr experience that by design requires communication and corporation which is what makes it such a great coop game.

I only just got a quest but this is one of the only titles I've seen that I can play coop with a friend that doesn't own a quest plus I love moving the camera in VR and the idea in general of having asymmetric coop

It's a really fun concept but the glitch where the blocks fly out from under Carly happens way too often and makes the levels unpassable, forcing you to restart the game really often. My friend and I ended up getting very frustrated because the glitch happens quite often.

developer_response.body:
Hi,
we recently made an update to the game that should fix the issue with glitchy blocks.
If you still get this issue with the updated version, feel free to email us at support@resolutiongames.com

Cheers!
/Resolution team

reviews.review_description:
This game is a great zombie shooter
 that you can play with friends i’ve been playing with my dad
That is all……
Does anyone notice a similarity between jimmy savile and the reaper man? After seeing the atrocities that man committed I'd say the resemblance is in very bad taste. Disgusting.
I’ve been waiting for something like this to play with the family. Love it, great job!
Good, nice, mmmhmmm, had fun. Nice job to whomever created the game. Don't listen to those bad reviews of those guys are just dicks

reviews.review_title: Don’t think about just buy it!!!
reviews.review_description: This game is so much fun and I love the fact that a friend can join and play for free. The puzzles are amazing and as you go from level to level the game gets better and better it’s a good way to connect with a friend during the pandemic I live in FL and the friend I play with lives in PA and we both enjoy it I hope to see more games like this in the future keep them coming!!!!

Unable to get room code for multiplayer with PC app. Submitted support ticket - zero response. From the FAQ on their site it's clear that they are aware of this problem, yet it's not fixed. I bought the game for the multiplayer, it's useless to me in this state.
Apparently I will submit refund request.

developer_response.body: Hello and thanks for reaching out about Carly and the Reaperman. I'm sorry you are experiencing issues with the game, we've additionally identified an issue with our inbound support form which should now been fixed. Could you please reach out to our team at support@beyondframes.com so that we can take a closer look at the issue? Thank you!

reviews.review_description: I have been enjoying the game with my friend for a month. Now we finally completed all 8 levels of challenges even the 8 bonus challenges. Super fun!!!! Highly recommended !!!!!

I hate when me and my boyfriend was trying to play i had to keep on telling him to move out of my way so I could see Carly but overall the game was fun just maybe make in the future where Carly is in first person

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review and the suggestion. We'll keep this in mind. :)

reviews.review_description: This is so good buy this it is well worth the 20 bucks
I wish you could be in first person when you  play as Carly while on Oculus because it gets kinda annoying having to move your screen around.
